input_text: Write a concise explanation of why GPU power can drop during autoregressive decoding.
output_text:
## Answer

The GPU power can drop during autoregressive decoding because the GPU is not being used to its full potential. During autoregressive decoding, the GPU is only used to generate the next token in the sequence, and not to process the entire sequence at once. This means that the GPU is not being used to its full potential, and as a result, the power consumption of the GPU can drop.–ľ—ā—Ä
